mapper.select: SELECT PROJECT_ID AS "projectId", PROJECT_CODE AS "projectCode", PROJECT_NAME AS "projectName", ROUTE_PREFIX AS "routePrefix", DEPLOYMENT_TARGET AS "deploymentTarget", PLATFORM_VERSION AS "platformVersion", PROJECT_MODULE_VERSION AS "projectModuleVersion", STATUS AS "status" FROM PROJECT_REGISTRY WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter}

SELECT pai.PROJECT_ID AS "projectId", avr.ARTIFACT_ID AS "artifactId", avr.ARTIFACT_TYPE AS "artifactType", avr.ARTIFACT_FAMILY AS "artifactFamily", avr.ARTIFACT_VERSION AS "installedArtifactVersion", pai.INSTALL_SCOPE AS "installScope", CASE WHEN pai.ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "activeYn", pai.RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS "releaseUnitId", pai.ROLLBACK_TARGET_VERSION AS "rollbackTargetVersion", TO_CHAR(pai.INSTALLED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "installedAt" FROM PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL pai JOIN ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY avr ON avr.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID = pai.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID WHERE pai.PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} AND pai.ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY pai.INSTALLED_AT DESC, avr.ARTIFACT_ID

SELECT PROJECT_ID AS "projectId", TO_CHAR(RECORDED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "recordedAt", ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS "adapterContractVersion", ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION AS "adapterArtifactVersion", COMPATIBILITY_CLASS AS "compatibilityClass", CASE WHEN MIGRATION_REQUIRED_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "migrationRequiredYn", CHANGED_PORT_SET_JSON AS "changedPortSetJson", CHANGED_DTO_SET_JSON AS "changedDtoSetJson", MAPPING_IMPACT_SUMMARY AS "mappingImpactSummary", RELATED_RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS "relatedReleaseUnitId" FROM ADAPTER_CHANGE_LOG WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY RECORDED_AT DESC

SELECT RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS "releaseUnitId", PROJECT_ID AS "projectId", RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID AS "runtimePackageId", PROJECT_RUNTIME_VERSION AS "projectRuntimeVersion", ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION AS "adapterArtifactVersion", ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS "adapterContractVersion", COMMON_ARTIFACT_SET_JSON AS "commonArtifactSetJson", PACKAGE_VERSION_SET_JSON AS "packageVersionSetJson", ROLLBACK_TARGET_RELEASE_ID AS "rollbackTargetReleaseId", TO_CHAR(BUILT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "builtAt", TO_CHAR(APPROVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "approvedAt", APPROVED_BY AS "approvedBy" FROM RELEASE_UNIT_REGISTRY WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY BUILT_AT DESC

SELECT SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_ID AS "serverDeploymentId", SERVER_ID AS "serverId", SERVER_ROLE AS "serverRole", PROJECT_ID AS "projectId", RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS "activeReleaseUnitId", DEPLOY_TRACE_ID AS "deployTraceId", HEALTH_STATUS AS "healthStatus", TO_CHAR(DEPLOYED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "deployedAt", DEPLOYED_BY AS "deployedBy" FROM SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_STATE WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY DEPLOYED_AT DESC

SELECT ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID AS "artifactVersionId", ARTIFACT_ID AS "artifactId", ARTIFACT_TYPE AS "artifactType", ARTIFACT_FAMILY AS "artifactFamily", ARTIFACT_VERSION AS "artifactVersion", COMMON_CORE_VERSION AS "commonCoreVersion", ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS "adapterContractVersion", API_CONTRACT_VERSION AS "apiContractVersion", MANIFEST_CONTRACT_VERSION AS "manifestContractVersion", CAPABILITY_CATALOG_VERSION AS "capabilityCatalogVersion", COMPATIBILITY_STATUS AS "compatibilityStatus", PUBLISHED_YN AS "publishedYn", TO_CHAR(PUBLISHED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "publishedAt", TO_CHAR(BUILT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "builtAt" FROM ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY WHERE ( ARTIFACT_ID = 'common-core' OR ARTIFACT_ID LIKE CONCAT(#{projectId}, '-%') OR GROUP_LINE = #{projectId} ) ORDER BY BUILT_AT DESC, ARTIFACT_ID

SELECT RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS "releaseUnitId", PROJECT_ID AS "projectId", RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID AS "runtimePackageId", PROJECT_RUNTIME_VERSION AS "projectRuntimeVersion", ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION AS "adapterArtifactVersion", ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS "adapterContractVersion", COMMON_ARTIFACT_SET_JSON AS "commonArtifactSetJson", PACKAGE_VERSION_SET_JSON AS "packageVersionSetJson", ROLLBACK_TARGET_RELEASE_ID AS "rollbackTargetReleaseId", TO_CHAR(BUILT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "builtAt", TO_CHAR(APPROVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "approvedAt", APPROVED_BY AS "approvedBy" FROM RELEASE_UNIT_REGISTRY WHERE RELEASE_UNIT_ID = #{_parameter}

SELECT ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID AS "artifactVersionId", ARTIFACT_ID AS "artifactId", ARTIFACT_TYPE AS "artifactType", ARTIFACT_FAMILY AS "artifactFamily", ARTIFACT_VERSION AS "artifactVersion", ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS "adapterContractVersion", COMMON_CORE_VERSION AS "commonCoreVersion", COMPATIBILITY_STATUS AS "compatibilityStatus" FROM ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY WHERE ARTIFACT_ID = #{artifactId} AND ARTIFACT_VERSION = #{artifactVersion}
mapper.update: UPDATE PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL SET ACTIVE_YN = 'N' WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} AND ACTIVE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RELEASE_UNIT_REGISTRY ( RELEASE_UNIT_ID, PROJECT_ID, RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID, PROJECT_RUNTIME_VERSION, ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION, COMMON_ARTIFACT_SET_JSON, PACKAGE_VERSION_SET_JSON, ROLLBACK_TARGET_RELEASE_ID, BUILT_AT, APPROVED_AT, APPROVED_BY ) VALUES ( #{releaseUnitId}, #{projectId}, #{runtimePackageId}, #{projectRuntimeVersion}, #{adapterArtifactVersion}, #{adapterContractVersion}, #{commonArtifactSetJson}, #{packageVersionSetJson}, #{rollbackTargetReleaseId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{approvedBy} )

INSERT INTO PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL ( PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL_ID, PROJECT_ID, ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID, INSTALL_SCOPE, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, ACTIVE_YN, ROLLBACK_TARGET_VERSION, INSTALLED_AT, INSTALLED_BY ) VALUES ( #{projectArtifactInstallId}, #{projectId}, #{artifactVersionId}, #{installScope}, #{releaseUnitId}, 'Y', #{rollbackTargetVersion}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{installedBy} )

INSERT INTO ADAPTER_CHANGE_LOG ( ADAPTER_CHANGE_ID, PROJECT_ID, ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION, CHANGED_PORT_SET_JSON, CHANGED_DTO_SET_JSON, MAPPING_IMPACT_SUMMARY, COMPATIBILITY_CLASS, MIGRATION_REQUIRED_YN, RELATED_RELEASE_UNIT_ID, RECORDED_AT, RECORDED_BY ) VALUES ( #{adapterChangeId}, #{projectId}, #{adapterArtifactVersion}, #{adapterContractVersion}, #{changedPortSetJson}, #{changedDtoSetJson}, #{mappingImpactSummary}, #{compatibilityClass}, #{migrationRequiredYn}, #{relatedReleaseUnitId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{recordedBy} )

INSERT INTO SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_STATE ( SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_ROLE, PROJECT_ID, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, DEPLOY_TRACE_ID, HEALTH_STATUS, DEPLOYED_AT, DEPLOYED_BY ) VALUES ( #{serverDeploymentId}, #{serverId}, #{serverRole}, #{projectId}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{deployTraceId}, #{healthStatus}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{deployedBy} )
